title: Online Quran Tajweed Course
description:
This Online Quran Tajweed Course is designed for students who already know basic Quran reading and want to improve their recitation with proper Tajweed rules.

Students will learn correct makharij, rules of Noon Saakin and Tanween, Madd, Qalqalah, Ikhfa, Idgham, and proper Quranic fluency. Classes are conducted one-on-one by qualified and experienced Quran teachers.

This course is suitable for children, teenagers, and adults worldwide.

title: Online Quran Nazra Course
description:
This Online Quran Nazra Course is designed for children and adults who want to learn Quran reading from basic to fluent recitation.

Students will learn proper pronunciation, correct makharij, and smooth Quran reading with the guidance of qualified online Quran teachers. One-to-one online classes are available worldwide.

title: Online Quran with Tafseer Course
description:
This Online Quran with Tafseer Course is designed for students who want to understand the meaning, message, and wisdom of the Holy Quran along with correct recitation.
Students will learn basic Arabic meanings, Tafseer of selected Surahs, Quranic lessons for daily life, and moral guidance under qualified Islamic scholars.

One-to-one online classes are offered for students from UK, USA, Canada, Australia, Germany, France, Italy, UAE, and other countries searching for an authentic online Quran academy with deep Islamic understanding.

title: Online Quran Hifz Program
description:
This Online Quran Hifz Program is designed for students who want to memorize the Holy Quran with proper Tajweed and revision system.

The program includes daily lessons, regular revision (Murajaah), and monthly assessments to ensure strong memorization. Experienced Huffaz guide students with a structured and disciplined approach.

This course is suitable for children and adults worldwide who are committed to memorizing the Quran.

title: Namaz & Daily Duas Course
description:
This Namaz & Daily Duas Course is designed to help students learn the correct method of Salah along with essential daily life duas.
Students will understand step-by-step Namaz, Wudu, Sunnah practices, and Masnoon duas with meanings. The course focuses on practical learning for children and adults.

Ideal for families in UK, USA, Canada, Australia, UAE, Germany, and other countries seeking structured online Islamic education.

title: Namaz & Daily Duas Course
description:
This Namaz & Daily Duas Course is designed for children and beginners who want to learn Salah step by step with correct method and understanding.

Students will learn Farz, Wajib, Sunnah, method of prayer, masnoon duas, daily life supplications, and basic Islamic manners. The course focuses on building a strong habit of prayer and connection with Allah.

Suitable for students and families in UK, USA, Canada, Australia, UAE, Germany, France, and worldwide looking for structured learning through an online Quran academy.

title: Islamic Manners & Akhlaq Course
description:
This Islamic Manners & Akhlaq Course focuses on developing good character, Islamic etiquette, and moral values in children and adults according to the Quran and Sunnah.

Students will learn daily Islamic manners, respect for parents and elders, honesty, patience, kindness, cleanliness, and social behavior. This course helps parents build strong Islamic character in children through a trusted online Islamic academy.

Suitable for students in UK, USA, Canada, Australia, UAE, Saudi Arabia, Germany, France, and worldwide.

title: Basic Arabic Language for Quran
description:
This Basic Arabic Language for Quran course is designed for students who want to understand Quranic Arabic from the foundation level.
Students will learn Arabic letters, basic grammar, common Quranic words, sentence structure, and simple translation concepts to connect more deeply with the Quran.

This online Arabic course is ideal for learners from USA, UK, Canada, Australia, UAE, Germany, France, Italy, and other countries who want to improve their understanding of the Holy Quran.

title: Islamic Studies for Kids
description:
This Islamic Studies for Kids course is specially designed to build a strong Islamic foundation in children through engaging and age-appropriate lessons.
Students will learn basic beliefs (Aqeedah), Islamic manners (Akhlaq), Seerah of Prophet ﷺ, basic Fiqh, daily Islamic practices, and moral values.

This online Islamic studies course is ideal for families in UK, USA, Canada, Australia, UAE, Germany, France, Italy, and other countries looking for trusted Islamic education for children in a safe online environment.

title: Fiqh & Basic Masail Course
description:
This Fiqh & Basic Masail Course is designed to help students understand daily life Islamic rulings in an easy and practical way.
Students will learn Taharah (purity), Salah rulings, fasting rules, halal & haram concepts, and common Islamic masail according to authentic sources.

This online Islamic Fiqh course is suitable for students and families in USA, UK, Canada, Australia, UAE, Germany, France, and other countries seeking reliable Islamic guidance.

title: Hadith Course (Basic  Bukhari & Muslim)
description:
This Online Hadith Course (Basic) introduces students to selected Ahadith from Sahih Bukhari and Sahih Muslim with simple explanation and practical lessons for daily life.

Students will learn the importance of Hadith, basic understanding of Islamic rulings, manners, worship, and character building according to the Sunnah. Ideal for children, teenagers, and adults studying through a trusted online Quran and Islamic academy.

Suitable for students in UK, USA, Canada, Australia, UAE, Germany, France, and worldwide.

title: Six Kalimas & Basic Beliefs Course
description:
This Six Kalimas & Basic Beliefs Course is designed for children and new learners to understand the core beliefs of Islam in a simple and clear way.

Students will learn all six Kalimas with meaning, basic Aqeedah (Islamic beliefs), importance of Iman, and how to apply these beliefs in daily life. The course helps build a strong Islamic foundation at an early stage.

Ideal for families in UK, USA, Canada, Australia, UAE, Saudi Arabia, Germany, France, and worldwide through a trusted online Islamic academy.

title: Noorani Qaida Course
description: Learn Quran reading from basics with proper pronunciation and foundation for Tajweed

title: Seerah of Prophet Muhammad ﷺ Course
description:
This Seerah of Prophet Muhammad ﷺ Course is designed to help students understand the life, character, struggles, and teachings of the Prophet ﷺ in a practical and inspiring way.

Students will learn about Makkah & Madinah periods, important events, Sunnah lifestyle, patience, leadership, and moral values. This online Seerah course helps build strong Islamic character for children, teenagers, and adults.

Ideal for families and students in UK, USA, Canada, Australia, UAE, Germany, France, and worldwide who want authentic Islamic learning from a trusted online Quran academy.
